title: Record a valid single expense
objective: Verify that a user can save an expense with mandatory fields and it appears in the timeline

steps.expected_result: Entry sheet opens with empty fields

steps.step: Select type = Expense, enter amount = 50, select Category = 'Food', select Account = 'Bank'

steps.expected_result: Sheet closes and a new expense row appears at the top of the Timeline
Bank account balance has decreased by 50
